mapper.select: SELECT c.classId, c.className, c.classNum, c.teaId, t.teaName, c.classChooseNum FROM Course c LEFT JOIN Teacher t ON c.teaId = t.teaId WHERE c.teaId = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Course (className, classNum, teaId, classChooseNum) VALUES (#{className}, #{classNum}, #{teaId}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE Course SET className = #{className}, classNum = #{classNum} WHERE classId = #{classId}
UPDATE Course SET classChooseNum = classChooseNum + 1 WHERE classId = #{id}
UPDATE Course SET classChooseNum = classChooseNum - 1 WHERE classId = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Course_choose (stuId, classId, score) VALUES (#{stuId}, #{classId}, 0)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM Course_choose WHERE stuId = #{stuId} AND classId = #{classId}
mapper.update: UPDATE Course_choose SET score = #{score} WHERE classId = #{classId} AND stuId = #{stuId}
mapper.select: SELECT classId FROM Course_choose WHERE stuId = #{stuid}
SELECT c.classId, c.className, c.classNum, c.teaId, t.teaName, c.classChooseNum FROM Course c LEFT JOIN Teacher t ON c.teaId = t.teaId WHERE c.classId = #{id}
SELECT i.insName FROM Course_limit cl LEFT JOIN Institution i ON cl.insId = i.insId WHERE cl.classId = #{id}
SELECT insId FROM Course_limit WHERE classId = #{classId}
SELECT s.stuId, s.stuName, cc.score FROM Course_choose cc LEFT JOIN Student s ON cc.stuId = s.stuId WHERE cc.classId = #{id}
SELECT s.stuId, s.stuName, cc.score FROM Course_choose cc LEFT JOIN Student s ON cc.stuId = s.stuId WHERE cc.classId = #{classid} AND cc.stuId = #{stuid}
SELECT c.classId, c.className, c.classNum, c.teaId, t.teaName, c.classChooseNum FROM Course c LEFT JOIN Teacher t ON c.teaId = t.teaId

SELECT c.classId, c.className, c.classNum, c.teaId, t.teaName, c.classChooseNum FROM Course c LEFT JOIN Teacher t ON c.teaId = t.teaId LEFT JOIN Course_limit cl ON c.classId = cl.classId WHERE cl.insId = #{id}
